lede: A look at October 18 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Robert Harting and Chuck Berry, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Azerbaijan
events.desc: The Supreme Council of Azerbaijan adopts a declaration of independence from the Soviet Union.

events.title: Félicette
events.desc: Félicette, a black and white female Parisian stray cat, becomes the first cat launched into space.

events.title: Argentina
events.desc: Argentine military officer and politician Juan Perón marries actress Eva Duarte.

events.title: Venezuela
events.desc: A group of the Venezuelan Armed Forces, led by Mario Vargas, Marcos Pérez Jiménez and Carlos Delgado Chalbaud, stages a coup d'état against president Isaías Medina Angarita, who is overthrown by the end of the day.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Soviet Union begins the liberation of Czechoslovakia from Nazi Germany.

events.title: Johannes Brahms
events.desc: Johannes Brahms conducts the premiere of his Double Concerto, composed for violinist Joseph Joachim and cellist Robert Hausmann.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: The Burning of Falmouth (now Portland, Maine).

events.title: Japan
events.desc: In Japan the fourth Battle of Kawanakajima is fought between the forces of Uesugi Kenshin and Takeda Shingen, resulting in a draw.

events.title: 1356 Basel earthquake
events.desc: Basel earthquake, the most significant historic seismological event north of the Alps, destroys the town of Basel, Switzerland.

events.title: Pappus of Alexandria
events.desc: Pappus of Alexandria, Greek philosopher, observes an eclipse of the Sun and writes a commentary on The Great Astronomer (Almagest).

births.name: Pierre Trudeau
births.line: Canadian lawyer, academic, and politician, 15th Prime Minister of Canada

births.name: Eric Stuart
births.line: American singer-songwriter, guitarist, and voice actor

deaths.text: Thomas Edison, American engineer and businessman, invented the phonograph
Ludwig III of Bavaria, King of Bavaria from 1913 to 1918
Sarah Churchill, Duchess of Marlborough, English noblewoman, courtier and politician
Emperor Ming of Jin, Emperor of the Jin dynasty from 323 to 325

observances.text: Christian feast day: Peter of Alcantara, can also be celebrated on October 19.
Day of Restoration of Independence (Azerbaijan), celebrates the independence of Azerbaijan from the Soviet Union in 1991.
